allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { node --version } else { "no-node" })

PowerShell($p = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($p\) { python --version } else { "no-python" }; $py = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { "py-launcher-present" } else { "no-py" })
